Package org.eventb.internal.core.sc.modules

  • Method Details

    • parseIdentifier

      protected static FreeIdentifier parseIdentifier(String name, IInternalElement element, IAttributeType.String attrType, FormulaFactory factory, IMarkerDisplay display, boolean primeAllowed) throws RodinDBException
      Makes a free identifier from the given name.

      Returns null if one of the following happens:

    • the given name cannot be parsed as an expression
    • the given name is not a valid free identifier name
    • the given name is primed and prime is not allowed
    • the given name contains leading or trailing spaces
      • For the first problem encountered, if any, a problem marker is added and null is returned immediately.

      Parameters:
      name - a name to parse
      element - the element associated the the name
      attrType - the attribute type of the element where the name is located
      factory - a formula factory to parse the name
      display - a marker display for problem markers
      primeAllowed - true if primed names are allowed, false otherwise
      Returns:
      a free identifier with the given name, or null if there was a problem making the identifier
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there is a problem accessing the Rodin database

    • parseIdentifier

      protected FreeIdentifier parseIdentifier(IIdentifierElement element, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Parse the identifier element
      Parameters:
      element - the element to be parsed
      Returns:
      a FreeIdentifier in case of success, null otherwise
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • fetchSymbols

      protected void fetchSymbols(IIdentifierElement[] elements, IInternalElement target, ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Fetch identifiers from component, parse them and add them to the symbol table.
      Parameters:
      elements - the identifier elements to fetch
      target - the target static checked container
      repository - the state repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the symbol table

    • createIdentifierSymbolInfo

      protected abstract IIdentifierSymbolInfo createIdentifierSymbolInfo(String name, IIdentifierElement element)
      Creates a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the identifier
      element - an element to which to attach problem markers
      Returns:
      a new instance of IIdentifierSymbolInfo

    • typeIdentifierSymbol

      protected void typeIdentifierSymbol(IIdentifierSymbolInfo newSymbolInfo, ITypeEnvironmentBuilder environment) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Adds type information about the given identifier symbol to the given type environment.

      This method is intended to be overridden by identifier modules that contribute to the type environment.

      Parameters:
      newSymbolInfo - a new identifier symbol info
      environment - the type environment of the state repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the symbol table

    • insertIdentifierSymbol

      protected boolean insertIdentifierSymbol(IIdentifierElement element, IIdentifierSymbolInfo newSymbolInfo) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Inserts the given new identifier symbol info for the given identifier element into the symbol table.

      In case the symbol is already present in the symbol table, a conflict marker is created for conflicting symbols.

      Parameters:
      element - an identifier element
      newSymbolInfo - a new symbol info related to the element
      Returns:
      true iff the symbol has been correctly added
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing conflicting symbol infos

    • initModule

      public void initModule(IRodinElement element, ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from class: SCProcessorModule
      Default implementation of initModule() does nothing.
      Specified by:
      initModule in interface ISCProcessorModule
      Overrides:
      initModule in class SCProcessorModule
      Parameters:
      element - the input "unchecked" element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem initialising this module
      See Also:
      • IProcessorModule

    • endModule
